name: Easy Shrimp Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, melt margarine over medium heat.
2. Add onions and bell pepper; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in celery and tomatoes; cook for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, garlic, cream of mushroom soup, remaining onions, celery, lemon juice, parsley, shrimp, and green onion tops.
5. Simmer the mixture over low heat for 30 more minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Serve the etouffee over hot rice.
